name: Image Generation
description: Illustrates the story with Novita AI or a local SD WebUI (Forge Neo — SDXL-class, Flux, Anima). Auto-generates every N turns, or on demand with /image. Configure provider, model, prompts, and LoRAs (Civitai + Hugging Face) in the Image Studio main-menu entry.

command_help./image: Generate an illustration of the current scene

modes.label: Image Studio
modes.description: Configure Novita AI image generation and browse the gallery

mutation_schema.turns_since_image: integer — storyteller generations since the last auto image
mutation_schema.last_trigger: string — id of the most recently started generation record
